programmes.show_description: OJ Borg is live through the night from Salford as he asks for your pointless skills. Plus, Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There and another dial of the Midnight Caller phone.

programmes.show_name: Alternative Sounds of the 90s with Dermot O'Leary
programmes.show_description: Dermot's quest to play all the great alternative albums continues with Reef, Oasis & Blur.
Welcome! It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Airdrum Anthems and our musical mystery game, Step Back in Time. Can you guess the year?
Scott's got another round of Elder Versus Millennial for you to educate the younger people in your life! Plus, the Birthday Game or take on the Easiest Quiz on the Radio.
Vernon explores the BBC archive in Vernon's Vault and two listeners take on the mid-morning music quiz Ten To The Top. Plus, Bob Mortimer chooses two more Tracks Of My Years.
Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
Sara gets you through teatime with plenty of giggles and some fab music. Plus Totally Teavoted, the SARA Awards, Alphabest and Hatched, Matched and Dispatched.
Sara plays the biggest and best tunes to get you up dancing!
Edith Bowman brings her Shiny Happy Playlist, 30 minutes of feel-good music from 7-7.30pm to soundtrack listeners' weekday evening.
Edith Bowman sits in and has the Thursday Theme: songs related to Toy Story, to mark 30 years since the film's UK release! Send your song suggestions to: edith.bowman@bbc.co.uk.

programmes.show_name: The Country Show with Bob Harris
programmes.show_description: Join Bob backstage at the O2 in London as he introduces live music from this year's C2C Festival, including songs from Waylon Wyatt, Ty Myers, Zach Top and Scotty McCreery!

programmes.show_name: The Good Groove with DJ Spoony
programmes.show_description: Feel-good dance floor favourites to make you groove, and DJ Spoony hits the decks for a live mix!
OJ Borg is live through the night from the Salford Riviera with Midnight Mastermind, Wish You Were There, Midnight Caller and a huge Ravio 2 to end the week.

programmes.show_name: Dance Sounds of the 90s with Vernon Kay
programmes.show_description: Vernon Kay takes you on a nostalgic trip back to the 90s dance floor with music and memories to get you moving.
Welcome! It's Early Breakfast with Owain Wyn Evans, featuring Airdrum Anthems and Step Back in Time. It's your weekend warm up! Owain asks what you cant wait for this weekend!
It's Big Guest Friday with Claire Foy, Jane McDonald and Les Dennis in the studio! Plus, the Wonder Years start in 1993.

Jeremy and guests discuss the news headlines and talk to the people making them.
Trevor is bringing you some of the best music from across the decades to get you through the afternoon.
It's All Request Friday, and Sara wants to hear from you on 88291 or sara.cox@bbc.co.uk.

programmes.show_name: The Rock Show with Shaun Keaveny
programmes.show_description: Shaun salutes Motörhead guitarist Phil Campbell, who died last week, with another chance to hear Phil's Rock God from 2019.
